textByHash.0a02b9cf126c9ad397d3ca276b6e8dd91dd8d4e2: So, do you feel up for the challenge?
textByHash.14acd7a5f7b5636d89eec83188d3e871ec129e44: Only the most worthy may access our guild and I'm afraid you are not quite there yet. Go out and hone your skills. Then you can return to us.
textByHash.1579bbaf61df53288b9b632be10f9bba9f6e6249: Thank you friend. You have helped us to fill our Library of Knowledge. The secrets that you have uncovered are worth more than any coin. It is an honour to welcome you into the Myths' Guild.
textByHash.1683d0e2cfe10d77b0a17a0ed1f7df3ee62a223d: Well you'd better investigate it then. If you help us fill our Library of Knowledge, we shall grant you access to the guild.
textByHash.175de6c9de9de226c7d48c0d4846d05f50b6edde: Here, we discover things that others only dream of. However, the cost of entry is not insignificant. Only the most worthy may share in our secrets.
textByHash.19bdd6b0470be09157be2f9711a00bd85d16a7e9: Absolutely. You've proven your worth to the guild and may enter whenever you please.
textByHash.20a966cc633e3fe71500f6c50f4fb531a2c98caa: Not yet. However, you are on the right path. Complete the task we've assigned you and we will allow you entry into the Guild.
textByHash.3529eb058d7d336b4cf500b4d7757d68dba1f93b: I hear we have a hero in our midst. You have faced one of the greatest threats this world has ever seen and come out victorious.
textByHash.39629b4054cb6590d2b183416fa06f01e1fa2509: The Myths' Guild is home to those who wish to uncover the lost secrets of this world. We investigate the myths of this land to see if any facts may be hidden within them.
textByHash.3f1318fe223f380b9801e7fa4a56e5844249c4e2: Head to Karamja Wines, Spirits, and Beers at Musa Point. There you'll find Dallas Jones. We've heard that he is investigating the destruction of Crandor. This seems like a good place to begin.
textByHash.3fe4b6f9eba78129e9a3ad2575e6ecbe4abc4126: Only the most worthy may access our Guild and I'm afraid you are not quite there yet. Go out and hone your skills then return to us.
textByHash.45e241f42672f66f37f9ac4b73e578026ca3907b: Here at the Myths' Guild, we live to tell the difference between the two. If you wish to join us, you must do the same.
textByHash.4d62b2548066fbf27ebb2518602d85e2f2ea2258: For as long as history remembers, dragons have roamed these lands. But despite how long they've been here, much of their history remains hidden.
textByHash.5d0eb9586740ef156724a7b81998d318c7f24621: For as long as history remembers, dragons have roamed these lands, but despite how long they've been here, much of their history remains hidden.
textByHash.5f26f8b293efaea109d8874ba2dd91986456590f: Well keep at it. If you help us fill our Library of Knowledge, we shall grant you access to the guild.
textByHash.5ff18998ecf4f1076ecbf87c0f7a9dfd3e0de911: We discover things here that others only dream of. The cost of entry is not insignificant though, only the most worthy may share in our secrets.
textByHash.64a9ea805697de32fec12d751c11c78f000b29aa: Well that can't be good. You'd better sort that out.
textByHash.86a7a489cacd037b3d2ab435cae1a344029968c2: Answer these questions for us. Help us fill our Library of Knowledge. In return, we will grant you access to the guild and you will reap the rewards within.
textByHash.8be0d1ce1c0dc1d019fe09e6cdd18d15b1271051: There are tales of course, but tales are not enough for us. We want you to discover the truth. Where did the dragons come from? Why are they here? Who do they serve?
textByHash.8ca05c288d16f326eaf9acd71c52bdd8995097e9: I'm afraid not. Perhaps that will change one day.
textByHash.9ec43e9549bd2217d5c86b2776ef347d9b7bef62: Well return to us once you do. If you help us fill our Library of Knowledge, we shall grant you access to the guild.
textByHash.ad0ba11ea289a092352737375322db4afa57ef35: As you wish. If you change your mind, you know where we are.
textByHash.ad3de0360160c7d8670999ef2484049fae293790: Only the most worthy are allowed access into the Myths' Guild. If you wish to enter, you'll need to prove yourself.
textByHash.b356518e39070cd7e98649682d69e3fb3e645973: Only the most worthy are allowed access into the Myths' Guild. If you want entry, you'll need to prove yourself.
textByHash.b84311c9920a983aead4bfc9b4d3bed2645461ec: Here you will discover things that others only dream of. The cost of entry is not insignificant though, only the most worthy may share in our secrets.
textByHash.b9dd91962b6deff8e988cc85bd16bea0338056d3: So do you feel up for the challenge?
textByHash.c044053adfb96fcfce76f0b0da260d29f07b2ab8: There are tales of course but tales are not enough for us. We want you to discover the truth. Where did the dragons come from? Why are they here? Who do they serve?
textByHash.c359f5f34646df5dabf9393c9bb01530eae889a6: Not yet. However, that could well change.
textByHash.cbe2398235ad77459e7d46644d3be606362feba2: Greetings, adventurer. Welcome to the Myths' Guild.
textByHash.d21711d3e20bf66ccf50904f6b8bb3bc858f40a3: Greetings adventurer. Welcome to the Myths' Guild.
textByHash.d72033471068c4d206c4e010e6c2fcf6c1d850f1: All that remains is to ensure that history will forever remember this day. Now, tell me everything.
textByHash.dc194dff6096f8097d27b4cf95b65e90b14e9d02: As time passes, that which was once fact, becomes myth. Some tales are just that, tales. However, some tales are something more.
textByHash.de3761a8dd7035979542f604af71dfee97b9030d: The Myths' Guild is home to those who wish to uncover the lost secrets of this world. We investigate the myths of these lands to see if any facts may be hidden within them.
textByHash.e91962b4e4b5974f6230b0104f4d7acc6dc3548e: I'm afraid the Guild is not currently accepting new members. However, we will soon be opening our doors again.
textByHash.eaae40a6c4554db0dc1edf8d1ac2a12faf9a70ee: Indeed. We will ensure their sacrifice is never forgotten.
textByHash.ed134d2ac9ee713b3d81dd8f4aaebf9b1cb009b3: When we do, you should return here. We may well have a place for you.
textByHash.f523ff40843bc7d0153187ce5e4c664fe1420036: Head to Karamja Wines, Spirits, and Beers at Musa Point. There you'll find Dallas Jones. We've heard that he is investigating the destruction of Crandor. This seems like a good place to start.
textByHash.fd57a20e14837b7bd1c764749c7a8dc928e3b488: Not yet. However, that could well change. Go out and hone your skills then return to us.
